blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.0 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,417 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 27".
